query: revenue from sale of energy of NHPC in the last five years

draft.notice: Generated from NHPC's past replies and the selected supporting documents only. Verify every figure and claim against the cited sources before use. This is not an approved reply.
draft.subject: Information for framing the reply of Parliament Question regarding revenue from sale of energy of NHPC
draft.opening: The information regarding revenue from sale of energy of NHPC in the last five years is as under:-

parts.question: revenue from sale of energy of NHPC in the last five years
parts.text: The revenue from sale of energy of NHPC for the last five financial years is as under:

columns: Revenue from Sale of Energy (₹ in Crores)

key_points.point: Revenue from Sale of Energy was ₹8,919.56 crore in FY 2024-25.
Revenue from Sale of Energy was ₹7,957.43 crore in FY 2023-24.
Revenue from Sale of Energy was ₹9,124.85 crore in FY 2022-23.
Revenue from Sale of Energy was ₹8,180.57 crore in FY 2021-22.
Revenue from Sale of Energy was ₹8,094.06 crore in FY 2020-21.

sources.question_text: c) The details of gross hydro power production and revenue generated for the sale of hydroelectricity in the last five years, State wise; and
sources.answer_text: May be replied by MoP/CEA. As far as NHPC is concerned, the state wise details of hydro power generation and revenue generated from Hydro stations during last five years is given at Annexure-II.

query: status of under construction hydro projects of NHPC

draft.notice: Generated from NHPC's past replies and the selected supporting documents only. Verify every figure and claim against the cited sources before use. This is not an approved reply.
draft.subject: Information for framing the reply of Parliament question regarding status of under construction hydro projects of NHPC
draft.opening: The information regarding the status of under construction hydro projects of NHPC is as under:-

parts.question: status of under construction hydro projects of NHPC
parts.text: NHPC is implementing several hydropower projects which are currently under construction. The details of these projects, including their proposed generation capacities, expected dates of commissioning, and current physical and financial progress, are as under:-

columns: Date of Completion as per Sanction
Financial Progress (%) (as per Revised/Anticipated Cost as on 30.06.2026)
rows: Mar'2027 (Units 1-8 commissioning between Dec'2025 and Mar'2027)

key_points.point: NHPC is implementing 2000 MW Subansiri Lower HE Project in Arunachal Pradesh / Assam.
The Subansiri Lower HE Project was likely to be commissioned in May 2025 as per a past reply.
The present expected date of completion for Subansiri Lower is March 2027, with units commissioning between December 2025 and March 2027, as on 30.06.2026.
Subansiri Lower project has a physical progress of 97.84% as on 30.06.2026.
Dibang MPP (2880 MW) has a present expected date of completion of Feb'2032 and physical progress of 17.78% as on 30.06.2026.
Teesta-VI (500 MW) has a present expected date of completion of Sep'2029 and physical progress of 73.48% as on 30.06.2026.
Ratle (850 MW) has a present expected date of completion of Nov'2026 and physical progress of 97.34% as on 30.06.2026.
Pakal Dul (1000 MW) has a present expected date of completion of Mar'2027 and physical progress of 31.29% as on 30.06.2026.
Kiru (624 MW) has a physical progress of 83.00% as on 30.06.2026.
Kwar (540 MW) has a present expected date of completion of Mar'2027 and physical progress of 87.00% as on 30.06.2026.
Uri-I, Stage-II (240 MW) has a present expected date of completion of Mar'2028 and physical progress of 36.52% as on 30.06.2026.
Dulhasti, Stage-II (260 MW) has a present expected date of completion of Nov'2029 / Nov'2028 and financial progress of 2.99% as on 30.06.2026.

gaps.reason: The supporting document 'projects_progress/9' does not provide the present expected date of completion for Rangit IV and Kiru projects. It also does not provide physical progress for Rangit IV and Dulhasti, Stage-II projects.

contradictions.topic: Expected date of commissioning for Subansiri Lower HE Project
contradictions.current: March 2027 (with units commissioning between December 2025 and March 2027) as on 30.06.2026

sources.question_text: (b) The number and names of hydropower projects currently under construction by NHPC along with their proposed generation capacities and expected dates of commissioning;
sources.answer_text: (including JV). Detail is as under- Abbreviations:

sources.question_text: (a) What is the present status of Hydropower Project constructed by the NHPC at Gerukamukh in Subansiri River?
sources.answer_text: NHPC is implementing 2000 MW Subansiri Lower HE Project in Arunachal Pradesh / Assam on Subansiri River, a tributary of Brahmaputra. Presently, the Project is in construction stage and likely to be commission in May 2025. The detailed status of the project is given at Annexure-I.

draft.opening: The information regarding under construction projects of NHPC with their capacities is as under:-

parts.question: list all under construction projects of NHPC with their capacities
parts.text: NHPC Ltd. has 8 Hydroelectric Projects with an aggregate installed capacity of 6434 MW under construction stage (2023-jan-apr lok_sabha 110, 2023-dec-jan lok_sabha 11881). As on 30.06.2026, the details of under construction projects of NHPC, including Joint Ventures, along with their capacities are as under:-

key_points.point: NHPC has 8 Hydroelectric Projects of 6434 MW under construction stage (as per 2023 replies).
The supporting document 'projects_progress/9' lists 10 under construction projects with their capacities as on 30.06.2026.

contradictions.past: NHPC has 8 Hydroelectric Projects under construction stage (2023-jan-apr lok_sabha 110, 2023-dec-jan lok_sabha 11881).
contradictions.current: The 'SALIENT DETAILS - UC Projects-Jun'26' document lists 10 projects as under construction as on 30.06.2026.

sources.question_text: (b) The number and names of hydropower projects currently under construction by NHPC along with their proposed generation capacities and expected dates of commissioning;
sources.answer_text: (including JV). Detail is as under- Abbreviations:

sources.question_text: (a) the details of hydro power projects constructed and under construction along with their installed capacities, State/UT-wise including West Bengal and Uttar Pradesh;
sources.answer_text: May be replied by Ministry of Power / CEA. As far as NHPC Ltd. is concerned, NHPC has constructed 22 hydro projects with aggregate installed capacity of 6971.2 MW across the country and 8 Hydroelectric Projects of 6434 MW are under construction stage. State wise details of same is placed at Annexure-I . Presently, NHPC does not possess any hydro Power Project in the state of Uttar Pradesh.

sources.question_text: (a) the details of hydro power projects constructed and under construction along with their installed capacities, State/UT-wise including Rajasthan ;
sources.answer_text: May be replied by Ministry of Power / CEA. As far as NHPC Ltd. is concerned, NHPC has constructed 22 hydro projects with aggregate installed capacity of 6971.2 MW across the country and 8 Hydroelectric Projects of 6434 MW are under construction stage. State wise details of same is placed at Annexure-I . Presently, NHPC does not possess any hydro Power Project in the state of Rajasthan.

sources.question_text: (b) The list of new projects being undertaken by NHPC?
sources.answer_text: Presently, 24 Power Stations with aggregate installed capacity of 7071.20 MW are under operation and 09 Projects with aggregate installed capacity of 5999 MW are under construction (including Joint ventures). Regarding new Projects being undertaken by NHPC, 18 Projects with an aggregate installed capacity of 12887.1 MW (including JV projects) are under clearance and 3 Hydroelectric Projects with an aggregate installed capacity of 1130 MW are under Survey and Investigation. List of these Projects is enclosed at Annexure-I.

sources.question_text: (a) NHPC Ltd. incorporated two Joint ventures with JKSPDC namely CVPPPL (Chenab Valley Power Projects (P) Ltd) and RHPCL (Ratle Hydroelectric Power Corporation Ltd.). NHPC is implementing Four Hydro project with total aggregate installed capacity of 3094 MW through CVPPP and one Hydro project of 850 MW through RHPCL. A brief detail of same is as summarized below:
sources.answer_text: NHPC Ltd. incorporated two Joint ventures with JKSPDC namely CVPPPL (Chenab Valley Power Projects (P) Ltd) and RHPCL (Ratle Hydroelectric Power Corporation Ltd.). NHPC is implementing Four Hydro project with total aggregate installed capacity of 3094 MW through CVPPP and one Hydro project of 850 MW through RHPCL. A brief detail of same is as summarized below: Abbreviations: CVPPPL: Chenab Valley Power Projects (P) Ltd. RHPCL : Ratle Hydroelectric Power Corporation Ltd.
